quote: Don't try to be a great man, just be a man. Let history make its own judgements.
author: Harry Z Cochrane

quote: Every expert was once a beginner.
author: Author 2

quote: Don't be afraid to break things — that's how you learn.
author: Author 3

quote: Your code doesn't have to be perfect, just functional — perfection can come later.
author: Author 4

quote: Keep building. The logic will click with time.
author: Author 5

quote: You're not stuck — you're learning something new.
author: Aurhor 6

quote: Read error messages; they're clues, not criticism.
author: Author 7

quote: Write code like your future self has to debug it.
author: Author 8

quote: Small wins in coding are still wins
author: Author 9

quote: The best way to learn to code is to keep coding.
author: Author 10

quote: Debugging is just problem-solving with extra steps.
author: Author 11
